//: Two example shapes for the bylaw-retrieval MCP server in Claude Desktop's config file.
//path: Save the actual file at ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (macOS) or the equivalent on your OS.
//pick-one: Use ONE of the two shapes below depending on what your Claude Desktop build supports.

mcpServers.//comment-http: PREFERRED: streamable-HTTP transport when Claude Desktop supports it directly. Replace YOUR_HOSTED_URL with the URL provided to you.
mcpServers.//comment-stdio: FALLBACK: stdio transport via a local bridge client. Use this if your Claude Desktop build only supports stdio. Replace the path with wherever the bridge binary lives.
